scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:core-coverage && npm run test:scanner-coverage && npm run test:e2e-coverage && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/browser coverage-reports/merged/browser.json && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/node coverage-reports/merged/node.json && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/browser-e2e coverage-reports/merged/browser-e2e.json && npx nyc merge coverage-reports/merged --out coverage-reports/merged/coverage.json && npx nyc report --temp-dir coverage-reports/merged --reporter=text --reporter=html --report-dir coverage-reports/merged
scripts.demo: npm run build && node generate-ssl.js && node serve.js
